_publications._publicationTitle: A high-throughput kinome screen reveals serum/glucocorticoid-regulated kinase 1 as a therapeutic target for NF2-deficient meningiomas.

_contextSnippet: In NF2-shRNA ACs or Ben-Men-1 cells, constitutive activation of both pNDRG1 and pS6 are attenuated upon treatment of with dual mTORC1/2 inhibitor Torin1 (250 nM, 1 h), compared to DMSO alone
details: Dual mTORC1/2 inhibitor Torin1 (250 nM, 1 h) attenuated constitutive activation of both pNDRG1 and pS6
